title: Monster Hunter Wilds

notes:
I've tried every proton version and I'm not sure what else to try but I get an error from the CodeFusion anti-tamper system that says "Sorry, something went wrong. For solutions please visit: https://support.codefusion.technology/anti-tamper/?e=88500006&l=en-US&p=s"

That leads to a Denuvo GmbH article that I also can't view.
I've seen previous people in this proton forum use other things to get this to run, but I've never had a problem running this before the Ver.1.041.00.00 update. I kept the same settings and tried running it now, and we're borked! Looks like I'll be waiting a while to play this, unless someone else figures out why it's borked. 
Before leaving this here for the next weary traveler, I even completely re-installed the game to confirm that it wasn't me. Still ran into the issue. Tried several different compatability versions. Tried rm -rf on the MonsterHunterWilds game directory, reinstall, didn't work. I think the game's actually just cooked.

I originally tried this on my ROG Strix G16 (NVIDIA GeForce 5060 Laptop GPU) and I thought it was the 5000 series card ruining the game for me but it turns out it's also happening on my main gaming rig. RIP. Looks like I'll go back to MH: World for now!
title: Monster Hunter Wilds

notes: After the recent performance patch I can happily say the game is very much playable and enjoyable at a stable 60FPS on my machine

title: Monster Hunter Wilds

notes:
I am on Fedora 43, running an Nvidia RTX 5080, driver 580.119 which seems to be bugged, i got the game working for a short while.

Here are the steps i took to get it working initially:
1. Use Proton Hotfix as it was Feb 26. 2026
2. Run with Arguement "mangohud %command%"

Those 2 fixed it for me. 

Some of you not on RTX 5080 may only need the hotfix
My brother on a 3070 works just fine with the Proton Hotfix only, but for some reason the current 580.119 nvidia driver has an error, and "mangohud %command%" seemed to fix it.

but as i was trouble shooting getting the fps away from my screen or alt tabbing out it would crash again. and due to Denuvo Anti Cheat, it locks me out for 24 hours every time i try a new Proton version.
So i am giving it up for now as i can't getting it working with the contrants of anti cheat stopping me every time i want to try a new solution.
title: Monster Hunter Wilds
